# Contributing

Thanks for taking an interest in the project.

Feature ideas, feature requests, fixes, and pull requests are all welcome here.

If you have an idea that would make the extension better, open an issue for it. If you already know how you want to build it, feel free to open a PR.

## Good areas to contribute

- solver improvements
- new features or workflow ideas
- smarter player-pool handling
- UI cleanup and consistency
- regression coverage
- stability when EA changes Web App behavior

## If you are opening an issue

Try to include what actually matters:

- what page or solver mode you were using
- what happened
- what you expected instead
- steps to reproduce it
- screenshots if it is a UI issue
- console logs if it is solve, fetch, or apply related

## If you are opening a pull request

Keep it focused.

- explain what changed
- explain why it changed
- include screenshots if the UI changed
- mention any logs, replay checks, or manual validation you ran

Small, focused PRs are much easier to review than large mixed ones.

If you are not sure whether an idea fits the project, open the issue anyway. I would rather have people suggest something interesting than hold back because they assume it is out of scope.
